title: mc mod [horror]
description: joke mod based off tbs with entities
body:
A JOKE HORROR MOD MADE AS A PARODY OF TERRIBLE THE BROKEN SCRIPT CLONES

Mod can:
Spawn entities
MOD IS SAFE TO PLAY MODRINTH-COMPATIBLE

CURRENT ENTITIES:

GL_1TCH (spawns anywhere) screamer (spawns in the glitchy place biome) (is immune to damage and flies and does insta-killing melee damage) V0id (spawns in if you say "V0id" in chat)
(he is a ground entity with a melee insta-kill he will despawn after he kills you and is immune to damage) W0rldEnd3r (spawns anywhere at night) (flies and does melee damage)
The_suffering (1st boss) (also spawns anywhere) (throws projectiles at the player)
Martin (2nd boss) (spawns by using the glitch stone which is obtained by defeating the_suffering) (flies and does melee damage)
Chef McEvil (final boss) (spawns when martin is killed) (basically just a beefy and fast Zombie)

(btw if ur having trouble with the Martin boss fight you have to use potions and arrows)
